heading: Transfer of functions
label: 765 Transfer of functions
notes: Transfer of FunctionsFederal Energy Administration terminated and functions vested by law in Administrator thereof transferred to Secretary of Energy (unless otherwise specifically provided) by sections 7151(a) and 7293 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare.
Abolition of Cost of Living CouncilCost of Living Council abolished , by Ex. Ord. No. 11788, § 1, , 39 F.R. 22113.July 1, 1974June 18, 1974

children.heading: Functions of Secretary and Department of the Interior
children.label: a Functions of Secretary and Department of the Interior

children.text: as relate to or are utilized by the Office of Petroleum Allocation;
as relate to or are utilized by the Office of Energy Conservation;
as relate to or are utilized by the Office of Energy Data and Analysis; and
as relate to or are utilized by the Office of Oil and Gas.

children.heading: Functions of Chairman and Executive Director of Cost of Living Council
children.label: b Functions of Chairman and Executive Director of Cost of Living Council
children.text: There are hereby transferred to and vested in the Administrator all functions of the Chairman of the Cost of Living Council, the Executive Director of the Cost of Living Council, and the Cost of Living Council, and officers and components thereof, as relate to or are utilized by the Energy Division of the Cost of Living Council.
